name: L-MARS: Legal Multi-Agent System with Agentic Search and Citation-Faithfulness Audit
summary: arXiv:2509.00761v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed for legal question answering, where evaluations typically focus on multiple-choice accuracy. This...
description: arXiv:2509.00761v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed for legal question answering, where evaluations typically focus on multiple-choice accuracy. This measure overlooks a common failure: whether the citation source attached to an answer exists and supports the rule the system attributes to it. We present L-MARS, an open multi-agent legal QA system...
author: Boqin Yuan, Ziqi Wang
